status: CWRC accommodation suite Phase-01 customization in progress across multiple sessions. Integration-heavy scope: Oracle + Parcomex + Emirates ID + bilingual contracts.

active_risks.text: Three-way integration dependency (Oracle, Parcomex, EID) introduces schedule risk
Residents without EID need manual check-in + 60-day access cap (ops burden + compliance trigger)
Bilingual (English + Arabic) legally binding contract generation introduces legal/compliance risk
Laundry service integration scope deferred — in-scope vs. Phase-2 decision pending

open_items.text: Produce Arabic contract generation spec (legal binding vs. data capture)
Model Moonflower catering report with billing reconciliation

recent_decisions.text: Facilio integrates with Parcomex for resident access control (activation/deactivation on check-in/out)
Residents without EID: 60-day temporary access; auto-deactivate on expiry
Fines recorded in Facilio, paid via Oracle, marked recovered in Facilio
English + Arabic contract module scoped in
Historical resident data cannot be deleted due to legal/governance rules
